'''âg-y-h''' ('''kagayah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rune|rune]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-y-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rune|rune]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-y-h
|-
! Lemma
| kagayah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigayah|thigayah]] || [[word:jigayah|jigayah]] || [[word:shigayah|shigayah]] || [[word:kigayah|kigayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugayah|thuthugayah]] || [[word:jujugayah|jujugayah]] || [[word:shushugayah|shushugayah]] || [[word:kukugayah|kukugayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugayah|thugayah]] || [[word:jugayah|jugayah]] || [[word:shugayah|shugayah]] || [[word:kugayah|kugayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugayah|thugayah]] || [[word:jugayah|jugayah]] || [[word:shugayah|shugayah]] || [[word:kugayah|kugayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegayah|thegayah]] || [[word:jegayah|jegayah]] || [[word:shegayah|shegayah]] || [[word:kegayah|kegayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogayah|thothogayah]] || [[word:jojogayah|jojogayah]] || [[word:shoshogayah|shoshogayah]] || [[word:kokogayah|kokogayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogayah|thogayah]] || [[word:jogayah|jogayah]] || [[word:shogayah|shogayah]] || [[word:kogayah|kogayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogayah|thogayah]] || [[word:jogayah|jogayah]] || [[word:shogayah|shogayah]] || [[word:kogayah|kogayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgayah|thĂŠgayah]] || [[word:jĂŠgayah|jĂŠgayah]] || [[word:shĂŠgayah|shĂŠgayah]] || [[word:kĂŠgayah|kĂŠgayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagayah|thathagayah]] || [[word:jajagayah|jajagayah]] || [[word:shashagayah|shashagayah]] || [[word:kakagayah|kakagayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagayah|thagayah]] || [[word:jagayah|jagayah]] || [[word:shagayah|shagayah]] || [[word:kagayah|kagayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagayah|thagayah]] || [[word:jagayah|jagayah]] || [[word:shagayah|shagayah]] || [[word:kagayah|kagayah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagayah|shagayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagayah|goshagayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagayah|gokishagayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagayahnĂŒ|shagayahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagayahnknĂŒ|goshagayahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagayahnĂŒ|gokishagayahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagayahshĂ«|shagayahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagayahnkshĂ«|goshagayahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagayahshĂ«|gokishagayahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagayahro|shagayahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagayahnkro|goshagayahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagayahro|gokishagayahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagayahmu|shagayahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagayahnkmu|goshagayahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagayahmu|gokishagayahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagayahsher|shagayahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagayahnksher|goshagayahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagayahsher|gokishagayahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagayahng|shagayahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagayahnkng|goshagayahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagayahng|gokishagayahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagayahya|shagayahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagayahnkya|goshagayahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagayahya|gokishagayahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagayahyam|shagayahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagayahnkyam|goshagayahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagayahyam|gokishagayahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagayahnĂŒshĂ«|shagayahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagayahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagayahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagayahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagayahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagayahnĂŒro|shagayahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagayahnknĂŒro|goshagayahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagayahnĂŒro|gokishagayahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagayahnĂŒmu|shagayahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagayahnknĂŒmu|goshagayahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagayahnĂŒmu|gokishagayahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagayahshĂ«nĂŒ|shagayahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagayahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagayahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagayahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagayahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagayahshĂ«ro|shagayahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagayahnkshĂ«ro|goshagayahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagayahshĂ«ro|gokishagayahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagayahshĂ«mu|shagayahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagayahnkshĂ«mu|goshagayahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagayahshĂ«mu|gokishagayahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagayahronĂŒ|shagayahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagayahnkronĂŒ|goshagayahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagayahronĂŒ|gokishagayahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagayahroshĂ«|shagayahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagayahnkroshĂ«|goshagayahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagayahroshĂ«|gokishagayahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagayahromu|shagayahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagayahnkromu|goshagayahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagayahromu|gokishagayahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagayahmunĂŒ|shagayahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagayahnkmunĂŒ|goshagayahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagayahmunĂŒ|gokishagayahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagayahmushĂ«|shagayahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagayahnkmushĂ«|goshagayahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagayahmushĂ«|gokishagayahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagayahmuro|shagayahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagayahnkmuro|goshagayahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagayahmuro|gokishagayahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
